steps: preserve the existing desktop shortcut when ownership is uncertain
identify whether the failure occurred in CMD, PowerShell, shortcut COM creation, WSL, tmux allocation, tmux creation, WezTerm process start, or terminal attachment
preserve bounded stderr and the local artifact paths
do not delete a created tmux session automatically after a later WezTerm failure
do not retry with raw wezterm or a second shortcut implementation
run the focused completeness validator before changing tracked contracts
repair the first deterministic failure in the same branch and evidence chain
rerun the exact failed stage and then the complete applicable path
emit an English report with one safe next command
stopConditions: missing dependency that requires separate installation authority
runtime state contradicts the selected session identity
live repair would require destructive cleanup or workstation-wide configuration replacement
proofCeiling: Failure localization and bounded repair evidence only.
